identity.name: AIIF CSR Conclave 2026
identity.visual_language: Ethnic motifs, Golden ratios, Architectural precision

buttons.primary: bg-[#641220] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-[#801B2E] transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 relative overflow-hidden group
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#641220] text-[#641220] px-8 py-4 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-[#641220] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300
buttons.gold: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] to-[#C5A059] text-[#2C1A05] px-10 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(212,175,55,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

cards.pricing: bg-white border border-[#D4AF37]/30 rounded-lg p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#D4AF37]
cards.feature: bg-[#F5F2E8] p-6 rounded-xl border border-transparent hover:border-[#D4AF37]/20 transition-all duration-300

containers.hero: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center relative overflow-hidden bg-[#FDFCF5]

hero.description: Left 40% (Content), Right 60% (Visual/Poster). Heavy focus on the 'Conclave 2026' typography. Poster should be presented like a framed artifact.
hero.background: Cream paper texture with subtle Kolam dot pattern

vision.description: Tamil quote 'Yathum Oore Yavarum Kelir' in large gold serif font against a dark maroon or blurred nature background. Parallax effect.

pricing.description: Three distinct 'Passes' arranged horizontally. Each pass looks like a physical ticket with perforated edges (CSS mask). Hover expands the ticket.

faq.description: Clean lines, heavy padding, maroon text. Plus/Minus icons in gold.

universal_guidelines: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (H1-H3). Use 'Manrope' for body text.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #1A0505 or #2D0A0F.
Buttons must have a 'jewel-tone' feel. Deep Maroon or Metallic Gold.
Ensure 'Yathum Oore Yavarum Kelir' is prominent in the Vision section.
Use the provided UPI deep links logic (e.g., upi://pay?pa=...) for the payment buttons.
Google Form link must be a primary CTA.
The poster has banana leaves/kolam - replicate these motifs using CSS or SVGs where possible, or use the poster itself as the main visual anchor.
Mobile Responsiveness: Stack the Hero section (Poster Top, Text Bottom) for screens < md.
instructions_to_main_agent: Create a 'components/ui/TicketCard.jsx' for the pricing section.
Use 'App.js' for the layout structure. Break sections into 'components/sections/Hero.jsx', 'components/sections/Vision.jsx', etc.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.
Background pattern: Create a subtle dot grid or radial pattern using CSS to mimic Kolam.
For UPI Links: Use format `upi://pay?pa=PHONE_NUMBER&pn=AIIF&am=AMOUNT&cu=INR` (Replace with actual details if provided, else use placeholders or just the deep link structure).
